titleStmt.title: Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 5947

p.seg: To all Christ's faithful to whom the present writing shall have come, Robert son of Reginald of Great Reston sends greeting.

to have given, granted, and made firm by this my present charter, to God, Saint Cuthbert, Saint Æbbe, and the monks of Durham serving God at Coldingham now and for ever in the future, in pure and perpetual alms, for the salvation fo my own soul, and [the souls] of my ancestors and successors, thirty acres and a half in the territory of the toun of Great Reston; that is, one-and-a-half acres in the toft and croft on the eastn side of my toft; five acres and three roods in Held' ; one-and-a-half acres between the woods; one acre in Gorbald; one acre in Coleleche and Bilie haluch; one acre in Hopeland and Smethemedwe; one acre in Brere; two acres in Wyterleche; one rood below Bilielawe; four acres on the upper side of Laytolf; eleven-and-a-half acres on the western side of Wythenehep; with the common pasture and common easements of the said toun of Reston. Wherefore I will that the said prior and monks of Durham should have and hold the said lands for ever, as freely, quitely, fully and honourably as any alms in the kingdom of Scotland is freely, quitely, fully, and honourably held or possessed. And I and my heirs shall warrant to the said prior and monks the said lands in perpetuity against all men.
And in testimony of this matter, I have applied my seal to this writing.
